data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust defense mechanisms against Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Global infrastructure limits the impact of large-scale attacks.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Data is encrypted in transit and at rest to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS for data in transit and 256-bit AES encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Authentication Protocols
data.description: Advanced authentication protocols to enhance user security.
data.technical_spec: Two-step verification and OAuth2.0 for secure access.

data.title: Intrusion Detection
data.description: Mechanisms to detect and respond to unauthorized system intrusions.

data.title: Security Patching
data.description: Regular update cycles to patch known vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated patch management systems with zero-day exploit handling.
